results.title: On the Rocks
results.overview: Faced with sudden doubts about her marriage, a young New York mother teams up with her larger-than-life playboy father to tail her husband.

results.title: Love on the Rocks
results.overview: Wong is shocked to learn from his girlfriend Annie (Leung) that she wants to break up. He decides to go online and seek help from love experts on the net. He finds Crystal, a 19-year old self-proclaimed love advisor who has never been actually involved in a relationship. As she assists Wong by telling him to revisit all of his ex-girlfriends in order to find out the root of his problems, the two of them also find themselves falling for one another.

results.title: The Flintstones: On the Rocks
results.overview: With their marriage on the rocks, Fred and Wilma take a holiday together to rekindle the fire in their relationship.

results.title: Chelsea on the Rocks
results.overview: Chelsea on the Rocks celebrates the personalities and artistic voices that have emerged from New York’s legendary Chelsea Hotel. Once considered an untouchable, impenetrable tower for writers, artists, musicians and mavericks, it has been recently claimed as a boutique hotel venture for a management company that shows disregard for its formidable history. –Cannes Film Festival

results.title: On the Rocks
results.overview: A day in the life of a Korean immigrant family, single mother and her two children as two worlds collide.

results.title: On the Rocks
results.overview: Kyle and Sam go through different stages of their lives as they hold onto the one constant thing in their lives, their friendship.

results.title: On the Rocks
results.overview: This short is like a mix of "Tales From The Crypt" & a PSA about the disparities between groups in South Africa.

results.title: God on the Rocks
results.overview: Growing up in a household incapable of showing love and affection, Margaret's life is transformed when Lydia, a worldly teenage maid, arrives.

results.title: On the Rocks
results.overview: Grace and Adam are two infatuated teenagers who run away from their troubled homes and take on a life on the road. Their relationship is put to the test when they are stranded in the Badlands.

results.title: Marriage on the Rocks
results.overview: Ad-agency president Dan Edwards goes to Mexico to celebrate his nineteenth wedding anniversary and winds up getting divorced by mistake, whereupon his wife Valerie marries his best friend Ernie Brewer by mistake.

results.title: On the Rocks
results.overview: A tumultuous relationship reaches its tipping point.

results.title: On The Rocks
results.overview: When college student Rachel discovers that her estranged father has passed, she must give an awkward eulogy to his oddball group of friends and family. During her speech, Rachel discovers that she and her father were far more similar than she ever would have wanted.

results.title: House on the Rocks
results.overview: Elena, the wife of a very rich man, spends the summer on an island in the Aegean Sea, doing archaeological research. One day her son comes to visit her son from her first marriage. The sea, the sun, the shepherds with ancient half-lingual rites, a handsome youth, not yet an old woman - no one remembered what happened in Ancient Greece ...

results.title: Tiger on the Rocks
results.overview: The Tasmanian Tiger twists and turns depending on how it's seen. Sheep-killing beast or tragic victim of human induced extinction. Ancient painting on a rock or vivid ancestor spirit. Lost forever, or a timely reminder to respect the connection between human and animal, culture, nature and country. In stunning landscapes across Australia where Thylacines once roamed, people from wide-ranging traditions share their experiences: First Nations artists, rangers and custodians; biologists, bone hunters and archaeologists. Multiple insights combine to throw light on Australia's most wanted animal.

results.title: Hanukkah on the Rocks
results.overview: A week before Hanukkah, recently unemployed lawyer Tory embarks on a journey to find Hanukkah candles, leading her to a Chicago bar where she transforms the holiday spirit, discovers love, and finds the courage to pursue a new path in life.

results.title: On the Rocks
results.overview: An overview of the sport of gymnastic rock climbing including 5.13 routes in California, Colorado and Wyoming and interviews with John Gill and Warren Harding.

results.title: Christmas on the Rocks
results.overview: A ski-lodge event manager’s task of hosting a corporate Christmas party goes awry when the resort is cut off by a snowstorm and the hard-to-please CEO turns out to be an old flame.

results.title: On The Rocks
results.overview: A group of singles meet at a bar -- and navigate the awkward dating grounds in L.A.

results.title: America on the Rocks
results.overview: Robert Mitchum, an admitted alcoholic, narrates this U.S. government short documentary on the dangers of alcoholism, delving into the reasons people drink to excess, the psychology of alcoholics, and recommendations for diminishing the scourge of alcoholism.

results.title: Trisha on the Rocks
results.overview: One fine Night Trisha (Janki Bodiwala) meets Vishal (Ravi gohil) at a party. Both of them are from different backgrounds and follow a different lifestyle. This meeting of both starts a super fun havoc with the cutest romance in their lives.
